items.text_prompt: Create a kid-safe Epic Errands goal card for an 8-year-old. Theme: Comic. Plain goal: "Read for 20 minutes". Return compact JSON only with keys title, narration, and reward_label. Do not include task lists, verification fields, snake_case, UI copy, or image text. Keep the ordinary goal visible, positive, parent-readable, and achievable. No shame, threats, monsters, weapons, private details, readable image text, or user photo references.
